cat inbox/msg_001.txt
From: Wouter van Dijk <wouter.van.dijk@blue-harbor-bank.example.com>
Subject: Could you resend the last invoice?

Hi,

Could you please resend the latest invoice for the account - Benelux compliance-heavy bank account Blue Harbor? I can't find it on my side.

Thanks,
Wouter van Dijk

params.message: The request to resend the latest invoice for Blue Harbor Bank has been processed. The latest invoice (INV-005-08.json) was identified, and a reminder (rem_011.json) has been created to follow up on the resend action.
